RemediationStrings.Title: NC_ShowSharedAccessUI (Administrative Templates - Network)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Network Connections\NC_ShowSharedAccessUI must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Network.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableMailslots (Administrative Templates - Network)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\NetworkProvider\EnableMailslots must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Network.

RemediationStrings.Title: \\*\SYSVOL (Administrative Templates - Network)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\NetworkProvider\HardenedPaths\\\*\SYSVOL must be RequireMutualAuthentication=1,RequireIntegrity=1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Network.

RemediationStrings.Title: \\*\NETLOGON (Administrative Templates - Network)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\NetworkProvider\HardenedPaths\\\*\NETLOGON must be RequireMutualAuthentication=1,RequireIntegrity=1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Network.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableMulticast (Administrative Templates - Network)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\DNSClient\EnableMulticast must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Network.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableNetbios (Administrative Templates - Network)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\DNSClient\EnableNetbios must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Network.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictRemoteClients (Administrative Templates - Network)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Rpc\RestrictRemoteClients must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Network.
